report.summary: Community v2 cycle: Drafted 5 tweets (#178-182) spotlighting 4 new learn guides (Perp DEX Wars, Paradex ZK, Virtuals Protocol, GRASS DePIN). Created Discord/TG announcement, newsletter addendum section. Designed 2 SVG social cards (Perp DEX Wars comparison + 4-guide content drop). Content calendar extended with new guide spotlights scheduled Sat-Mon.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #178: Perp DEX Wars 2026 spotlight — 26% of futures onchain, Hyperliquid $40.7B vs Aster $31.78B vs Lighter $25.38B vs Paradex zero-fee ZK. Scheduled: Sat Mar 28, 4PM ET.
Tweet #179: Paradex Deep Dive thread (4 parts) — DIME tokenomics, ZK-encrypted orderbooks, Starknet L2, $244B cumulative volume, $0 fees. Scheduled: Sun Mar 29, 10AM ET.
Tweet #180: Virtuals Protocol spotlight — 18,000+ AI agents, $450M+ GDP, $1B+ mcap on Base. Scheduled: Sun Mar 29, 2PM ET.
Tweet #181: GRASS Protocol DePIN — 8.5M MAU selling idle bandwidth, 100+ TB daily, ~20 AI clients. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 10AM ET.
Tweet #182: Content Drop thread — all 4 guides linked with key stats. 552 pages and counting. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 2PM ET.
Discord/TG: New Content Announcement — 4 guides with descriptions and key metrics. Posted: Fri Mar 27.
Newsletter v29 Addendum: Fresh Guides This Week section — Perp DEX Wars, Paradex, Virtuals, GRASS with descriptions and links.
Content calendar extended through Mon Mar 30 with 5 new guide-spotlight pieces.
